reason: Several source files exist in the codebase that are not listed in ARCHITECTURE.md's directory structure: src/detector/matcher.js, src/detector/ollama.js, src/server/cert.js, src/server/httpsServer.js, src/server/middleware.js, and the src/cli/ directory. These are flagged as 'partial' gaps in architecture.json (match: 78%). Without acknowledging these files in the architecture, gap analysis will continue to flag them as deviations, and developers lack authoritative guidance on their intended role.
proposedChange: Add the following to ARCHITECTURE.md under the relevant sections: (1) detector/matcher.js and detector/ollama.js under the Detector module; (2) server/cert.js, server/httpsServer.js, server/middleware.js under the Server module; (3) src/cli/ directory under the directory structure. Alternatively, if these files are intentional extras not part of the core architecture, document them as 'implementation details' outside the spec boundary.
